title: Hunter Killer
move_pattern: Starts with Tenderizing Goop, then randomly chooses between Bite (cannot repeat) and Puncture (weighted 2x). After any move, loops back to random selection between Bite and Puncture.
notes: After the opening Tenderizing Goop, all subsequent moves are randomly chosen. Bite cannot repeat consecutively; Puncture has weight 2 (twice as likely). Tenderizing Goop also loops back to the random branch.
